## Type of Change

<!-- Mark the relevant option(s) with an "x". -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/CD or build configuration change

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's architecture (Feature-First Clean Architecture)
- [ ] I have added the feature under `lib/features/<feature_name>/` with proper layering
- [ ] My changes do not introduce cross-feature imports
- [ ] I have run `fvm dart analyze` with no issues
- [ ] I have run `fvm dart format . --line-length=120`
- [ ] I have added/updated tests for my changes
- [ ] I have run `fvm flutter test` and all tests pass
- [ ] I have updated translations in `lib/l10n/` if needed
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
